# Wallet Key Validator Kit

Canonical repository: https://github.com/devdasx/wallet-key-validator-kit

Wallet Key Validator Kit validates wallet key formats:

- BIP-39 English mnemonics.
- secp256k1 private keys.
- Solana ed25519 private-key inputs.
- WIF private keys.
- BIP32/SLIP132 extended keys including xpub/xprv, ypub/yprv, zpub/zprv, tpub/tprv, Ltub/Ltpv, Mtub/Mtpv.

Package:

- npm: `wallet-key-validator-kit`
- CLI: `walletkeycheck`
- import: `import { validateWalletKey } from "wallet-key-validator-kit";`

Primary APIs:

- `validateMnemonic(value)`
- `validatePrivateKey(value, { chain })`
- `validateWif(value, { chain })`
- `validateExtendedKey(value, { chain })`
- `validateWalletKey(value, { chain })`
- `listChains()`

Validate:

```bash
npm test
examples/run-examples.sh
```

Full context: https://devdasx.github.io/wallet-key-validator-kit/llms-full.txt
